articles.title: Dogecoin rallies after Elon Musk’s Twitter takeover
articles.description: Dogecoin was ranked as the eighth largest cryptocurrency on Saturday afternoon.

articles.title: How Twitter Will Embrace DOGE And Crypto Under Elon Musk
articles.description: Social media platform Twitter has been dabbing into crypto for the past years, and the recent Elon Musk takeover might open the door to growing these efforts with Dogecoin (DOGE) at the center. The entrepreneur will implement changes to the platform. This possibility has created a lot of expectations from crypto investors. Related Reading: Do […]

articles.title: Dogecoin Whale Transfers $9M In DOGE To Binance As Price Shoots Up
articles.description: Data shows a Dogecoin whale has transferred more than $9 million worth of DOGE to Binance, as the price of the crypto has been shooting up. articles.title: Dogecoin price rallies 150% in 4 days, but DOGE now most 'overbought' since April 2021
articles.description: DOGE price could drop 60% by the end of this year as it reaches its most overbought level since April 2021.

articles.title: Dogecoin ($DOGE) Surges 65% on Speculation That Twitter Will Introduce New Use Cases
articles.description: On Saturday (October 29), trading volume of popular meme-based cryptocurrency $DOGE exploded to over $500 million in the past 24-hour period as the coin surged over 65% to become the 8th most valuable cryptoasset by market cap. Dogecoin was initially released on 6 December 2013, as a “fun and friendly internet currency.” It was created by Billy […]

articles.title: Dogecoin Price Prediction- Can Musk Twitter Takeover Pump DOGE to $1?
articles.description: Dogecoin price continues to reward investors amid an Elon Musk-triggered rally. As reported on Friday, the largest meme coin surpassed the forecasted target at $0.1000. If the attention DOGE is getting spills into the new week, investors can acclimatize to Dogecoin price tagging of $1.0000.... articles.title: Huobi May Soon Lay Off Employees Under Its Rumored CEO Justin Tron’s Leadership: Report
articles.description: As per a tweet shared by Wu Blockchain, Justin Tron may soon initiate mass layoffs in his newly acquired exchange Huobi. Wu further shared how Huobi’s CEO and CFO have already submitted their resignations to Justin Tron. Per a recent tweet shared by Wu Blockchain’s journalist Colin Wu, the former CEO and CFO of Huobi have submitted their resignations to Justin Tron’s team following the alleged acquisition of Huobi by Tron crypto founder Justin Tron. articles.title: Charles Hoskinson Invites Dogecoin to Migrate to Cardano for Free
articles.description: Cardano founder Charles Hoskinson says Dogecoin should become a Cardano sidechain and is willing to help the meme coin migrate free of charge.

articles.title: Cardano’s Founder, Charles Hoskinson, Says $DOGE Could Soon Merge With Twitter. Is Twitter Finally Getting Doge Payments?
articles.description: Cardano’s Charles Hoskinson believes that Elon Musk may soon merge Dogecoin with Twitter Musk had earlier tweeted his intention of adding Doge payment integration to Twitter. Cardano’s founder and IOHK head, Charles Hoskinson, believes that Dogecoin could soon merge with Twitter now that the internet’s “Dogefather,” Elon Musk, has taken control of the social media platform. articles.title: Cosmos to vote on new security model for network’s Hub next week
articles.description: The Cosmos community will vote on Oct. 31 on a proposal to approve changes to the network's Hub.

articles.title: ZkSync is working on Layer 3 blockchain for Ethereum
articles.description: Matter Labs, developer of zkSync, said it’s working on a Layer 3 chain called Opportunity.

articles.title: $DOGE: Crypto Analyst Who Called 2018’s Market Boom Points to ‘Crazy Bullish’ Dogecoin Chart
articles.description: A top cryptocurrency strategist that has gained a large following on social media after accurately calling bitcoin’s 2018 bear market bottom above $3,000, is now pointing to a ‘crazy bullish’ Dogecoin ($DOGE) chart.
